compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect eval replacement with deterministic testing
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update existing project documentation to reflect the removal of promptfoo evals and addition of deterministic contract/integrity testing.
**Why**: CLAUDE.md has extensive references to skill evals, eval runner, eval CI. These must be updated to reflect the new testing approach.
**Scope**:
- IN: Remove CLAUDE.md skill eval references (quick reference, architecture section, never-do rules)
- IN: Update CLAUDE.md to document contract tests and referential integrity linting
- IN: Update any workflow docs that reference eval infrastructure
- OUT: Creating new documentation files

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md accurately describes the deterministic testing approach (contract tests, referential integrity linting) with no references to the old eval/promptfoo system
  ← Satisfies: All success criteria (documentation reflects implemented changes)

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.

comments.body: Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Done definition update: SKILL-EVALS-GUIDE.md reference in llms.txt must be removed or replaced.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Fixed: Documentation updated — CLAUDE.md and llms.txt document deterministic testing, zero old eval references remain
comments.author: Test
